Check for Low Variability

Source: R/statistics.R
pls_is_low_variability.Rd

Checks if behavior data has low variability which could cause numerical issues (division by zero in correlation).

Usage

pls_is_low_variability(behavdata, threshold = 1e-10)

Arguments

behavdata

Behavior data matrix

threshold

Minimum standard deviation allowed

Value

Logical, TRUE if low variability detected

On this page
